domain: CNC router, woodworking machine, saw, planer, and dust-collection hardware

ideas.idea_title: Gantry CNC router spindle carriage with dust shoe
ideas.product_context: A moving spindle assembly used on a gantry-style CNC router for sheet goods, cabinet panels, and nested woodworking operations.
ideas.core_function: Holds the router spindle, guides vertical travel, and surrounds the cutting area with a brush-backed dust shoe.
ideas.likely_main_part: Layered carriage plate carrying linear blocks, spindle clamp, Z-axis slide, and dust-shoe mount.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines flat plates, rail interfaces, clamp geometry, nested openings, and a partially transparent accessory region without needing exact machine dimensions.

ideas.idea_title: Tilting table saw blade guard and riving knife bracket
ideas.product_context: A safety hardware assembly mounted behind the blade area of a woodworking table saw.
ideas.core_function: Supports a riving knife, holds a pivoting blade guard, and keeps alignment with the blade path during cutting adjustments.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved bracket with slotted adjustment holes, hinge ears, and a narrow knife-like plate.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin safety plates, curved guards, pivot lugs, clearance slots, and feature placement around an implied rotating blade envelope.

ideas.idea_title: Planer cutterhead chip hood with hose outlet
ideas.product_context: A dust and chip extraction hood fitted over the cutterhead area of a thickness planer.
ideas.core_function: Captures high-volume shavings from the cutterhead and routes them toward a dust-collection hose.
ideas.likely_main_part: Swept hood shell with rectangular intake mouth, rounded transition, and cylindrical outlet collar.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges representation of smooth transitions between rectangular and round openings, hollow shell intent, flange details, and directional flow geometry.

ideas.idea_title: CNC router vacuum hold-down zone manifold
ideas.product_context: A manifold plate used under a CNC router spoilboard to distribute vacuum to selectable cutting zones.
ideas.core_function: Routes vacuum from a main inlet to multiple gated channels so wood sheets stay fixed during machining.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat manifold body with branching channels, gasket grooves, valve pockets, and port collars.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests internal routing, repeated sealed zones, shallow grooves, planar layouts, and the distinction between visible surface features and hidden flow paths.

ideas.idea_title: Sliding compound miter saw fence extension stop
ideas.product_context: An adjustable stop and fence extension accessory for repeat cuts on a sliding compound miter saw station.
ideas.core_function: Extends the saw fence and provides a flip-down stop for repeatable woodworking cuts.
ideas.likely_main_part: Extruded rail-like fence body with sliding stop block, pivoting flag, and clamp knob boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises long prismatic rails, movable accessory blocks, hinge-like stop features, knobs, and repeatable profile details without fixed length requirements.

ideas.idea_title: Cyclone dust separator inlet and cone body
ideas.product_context: A compact cyclone separator mounted between woodworking machines and a shop dust collector.
ideas.core_function: Spins dust-laden air so chips fall into a collection bin before air continues to the vacuum system.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tapered cyclone cone with tangential inlet, top outlet tube, and bin-mounting flange.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests conical bodies, tangential cylindrical intersections, hollow airflow features, flange bolt patterns, and non-orthogonal relationships.

ideas.idea_title: Jointer planer adjustable outfeed table hinge support
ideas.product_context: A support bracket for fine alignment of a jointer or planer outfeed table relative to the cutterhead.
ideas.core_function: Allows the table to pivot and lock while maintaining a stable coplanar reference surface for boards.
ideas.likely_main_part: Heavy side casting with hinge barrel, locking boss, ribbing, and adjustment screw pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines cast-looking ribs, hinge cylinders, flat reference faces, threaded adjuster locations, and load-bearing asymmetry.

ideas.idea_title: Band saw lower wheel cover with dust port
ideas.product_context: A removable lower enclosure panel for a woodworking band saw.
ideas.core_function: Covers the lower wheel area, provides access for blade changes, and connects to dust extraction near the lower guide path.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved cover panel with recessed wheel bulge, latch bosses, hinge tabs, and angled dust port.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests shallow domed surfaces, door-like hardware, wheel clearance volumes, asymmetric ports, and cover-panel thickness.

ideas.idea_title: CNC router automatic tool setter puck mount
ideas.product_context: A fixed probing accessory installed on a CNC router bed for measuring tool length during woodworking jobs.
ideas.core_function: Presents a repeatable contact surface for the router bit and protects probe wiring from chips and dust.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low-profile puck holder with circular contact recess, cable strain relief, mounting ears, and protective lip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises small fixture geometry, concentric circular features, cable-routing detail, protected contact zones, and mixed rounded and flat forms.

ideas.idea_title: Router table lift crank plate and motor clamp
ideas.product_context: A lift mechanism installed under a router table to raise and lower a woodworking router motor.
ideas.core_function: Clamps the router motor and converts crank adjustment into controlled vertical movement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Motor clamp ring carried by a lift plate with guide posts, crank socket, and lead-screw support boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split-ring clamp intent, aligned guide structures, screw-driven motion features, circular motor clearance, and layered mechanical packaging.
